title: Dashboard Reliability & Security Fixes
summary: Standardized error responses, fixed silent catch blocks, verified error boundaries and RBAC

error_standardization.description: Replaced all NextResponse.json({ error: ... }) with error helpers (badRequest, internalError, validationError)
error_standardization.impact: Consistent error response format with proper status codes and error codes

silent_catch_fixes.description: Added console.warn logging to 12+ empty catch blocks

error_boundaries.description: Verified both error boundaries exist and are properly implemented
error_boundaries.impact: Global and component-level error handling in place

rbac_audit.impact: Audit endpoint protected with role-based access control

test_results.note: Pre-existing test failures unrelated to these changes
